name: Gifted Monitor
description: 24/7 uptime monitoring SaaS with instant email alerts and a public REST API.

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'Deploy complete — tables auto-created on first startup'

PORT.description: Port the server listens on (Heroku sets this automatically)

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign JWTs — must be a long random string

FRONTEND_URL.description: Full URL of your deployed app, e.g. https://your-app.herokuapp.com — used in verification email links

RESEND1_API_KEY.description: Resend API key for sending emails (get one at resend.com)

RESEND1_DOMAIN.description: Verified Resend sending domain, e.g. alerts.yourdomain.com

RESEND2_API_KEY.description: Optional second Resend API key for round-robin failover

TIMEZONE.description: Server timezone, e.g. UTC or Africa/Nairobi

PING_CHECK_INTERVAL_SECS.description: How often (in seconds) the ping engine checks monitors

MIN_PING_INTERVAL_MINS.description: Minimum monitor check interval in minutes (0.5 = 30 seconds)
